title: astelia solandri
intro: Astelia solandri, also known as the New Zealand astelia, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can provide relief from colds, flu, and other respiratory ailments, as well as offer antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits for overall health. Additionally, Astelia solandri has been used in traditional Maori medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, highlighting its potential as a natural remedy for a range of health concerns.
